name: claude-code-godot-setup
description: Devcontainer setup for Claude Code with Godot MCP servers

scripts.devcontainer:up: set -a && . ./.env 2>/dev/null; set +a; CID=$(docker ps -aq -f label=devcontainer.local_folder=$(pwd)); [ -n "$CID" ] && docker rm -f $CID; devcontainer up --workspace-folder . && ./scripts/bridge.sh start
scripts.opencode:prompt: set -a && . ./.env 2>/dev/null; set +a; devcontainer exec --workspace-folder . opencode run
scripts.devcontainer:down: ./scripts/bridge.sh stop; CID=$(docker ps -aq -f label=devcontainer.local_folder=$(pwd)); [ -n "$CID" ] && docker rm -f $CID && echo 'Container removed' || echo 'No container found'
